data.title: CFTC and SEC join forces on 'Project Crypto', with Chairs Selig and Atkins discussing regulation harmonization at agency event.
data.description: On Thursday, CFTC Chair Michael Selig and SEC Chair Paul Atkins co-hosted a collaborative discussion focusing on aligning regulatory approaches towards cryptocurrency. The event emphasized the importance of harmonizing regulations in this rapidly growing industry. Key topics covered included streamlining procedures, improving oversight, and enhancing clarity for market participants. This significant initiative aimed to address the challenges posed by the evolving landscape of cryptocurrency, gathering the perspectives of industry experts and stakeholders.

data.title: Father of eight, Jason Hubbard, acquires Dickey’s Barbecue Pit in Fort Collins and Greeley from aerospace to barbecue.
data.description: A resident of Northern Colorado, Jason Hubbard, has taken ownership of two Dickey’s Barbecue Pit establishments in Fort Collins and Greeley. Transitioning from the aerospace sector to the barbecue business, Hubbard leverages his supply chain skills in overseeing the locations at 2721 S. College Ave in Fort Collins and 6628 W. 10th Street in Greeley. With eight children and strong community connections, Hubbard aims to bring a new flavor to the local dining scene.

data.title: IotaComm® introduces 800 MHz LoRaWAN® Reference Design and Environmental Sensor on licensed spectrum platform.
data.description: A recent announcement from IotaComm® in Chapel Hill, N.C., on Jan. 29, 2026, highlighted a breakthrough in accelerating ecosystem development for carrier-grade LPWAN. The new hardware, software, and modem reference architecture has been introduced, aimed at boosting the ecosystem growth. Additionally, an FCC-authorized Environmental Sensor has been revealed, indicating commercial readiness. This move showcases a strategic advancement in the industry towards widespread adoption.

data.title: Inventor from Lake City, Fla. creates DOGGY PLAYHOUSE kit for dogs with feeding/watering and urinating/defecating options.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on January 29, 2026, an inventor from Lake City, Florida shared their motivation behind creating a comprehensive kit for dogs. The inventor aimed to provide a convenient and mess-free solution for feeding, watering, urinating, and defecating for dogs. The innovative product, known as the DOGGY PLAYHOUSE, integrates all these functions in one design. This all-in-one kit offers a streamlined approach to pet care and is designed to enhance the experience for both dogs and their owners.

data.title: Scott Woodward named 2025 Distinguished Alumnus by Saint Leo University, award to be presented in Alumni Weekend March 6-8, 2026.
data.description: On January 29, 2026, Scott Woodward, the CEO & Chief Creative Officer at SEW Branded, has been selected as the recipient of the 2025 Distinguished Alumnus/a Award by Saint Leo University. The award ceremony will take place during the Alumni Weekend scheduled for March 6–8, 2026.

data.title: Lead Glass Pro, a U.S. supplier of radiation shielding products, expands to support medical imaging construction projects.
data.description: A company located in Laguna Beach, California, Lead Glass Pro, disclosed on January 29, 2026, through PRNewswire that it is experiencing ongoing expansion in its services. This U.S.-based provider specializes in offering radiation shielding solutions for medical imaging settings. The company is enhancing its capabilities and extending its product range to cater to the needs of hospitals, imaging facilities, and construction groups.

data.title: Shipley Donuts reintroduces heart-shaped donuts for Valentine's Day, available for 2 weeks while supplies last.
data.description: Houston residents can once again indulge in Shipley Donuts' popular heart-shaped treats for a limited time of two weeks. The renowned brand, known for their fresh, handmade daily donuts and kolaches, is reintroducing the beloved Valentine's Day-themed pastries. The heart-shaped donuts will be available while supplies last, marking the perfect gift for the upcoming holiday. Shipley Donuts' trio of heart-shaped delights is set to make a sweet return just in time for Valentine's Day, creating a special treat for customers in Houston.

data.title: Mutual fund industry's assets rose by $79.86 billion in December 2025, totaling $31.38 trillion.
data.description: As of December, the total assets of the U.S. mutual funds rose by 0.3%, reaching $31.38 trillion - showing an increase of $79.86 billion. This data was revealed in the recent official survey conducted by the Investment Company Institute on the mutual fund industry.

data.title: Churchill Stateside Group gives $14M loan for Lakeview Terrace Apts in Augusta, GA. FHA/HUD 223(f) loan for 200-unit family community.
data.description: Churchill Stateside Group, LLC (CSG) has successfully secured a $14 million FHA 223(f) permanent loan for Lakeview Terrace Apartments in Augusta, Georgia. This 200-unit family apartment complex has recently been completed. The FHA/HUD 223(f) loan offers stable, fixed-rate financing for established multifamily properties, facilitating the transition from construction to long-term financing. This loan enables Lakeview Terrace Apartments to continue providing housing for families in the area.

data.title: Jordan Chiles wins back bronze medal in gymnastics floor event after Swiss court ruling against CAS. Gibson Dunn represented her.
data.description: In Los Angeles, Gibson Dunn and co-counsel Homburger AG shared news that they effectively convinced the Swiss Federal Supreme Court to reverse the Court of Arbitration for Sport's ruling that removed Jordan Chiles, their client and two-time U.S. Olympic gymnast, of the bronze medal she attained in the women's gymnastics floor event post the Summer 2024 Olympic Games. This significant win upholds Chiles' rightful bronze medal status.

data.title: Intel is benefiting from semiconductor supply crunch with Apple, Nvidia moving orders due to Taiwan Semiconductor capacity pressures, giving Intel an opportunity to advance its foundry ambitions and compete with Samsung Electronics.  Opportunity for Intel as Apple and Nvidia redirect orders from Taiwan Semiconductor due to capacity strains.
data.description: Intel Corp. (INTC) is benefiting from the current AI-driven semiconductor supply shortage after Apple Inc. (AAPL) and Nvidia Corp. (NVDA) redirected some orders away from Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. Ltd. (TSM). This move allows the U.S. chipmaker to expand its foundry ambitions and compete more directly with Samsung Electronics Co. Ltd. (SSNLF) in advanced manufacturing. Industry sources refer to this as the "Taiwan Semiconductor trickle-down effect." This shift highlights the pressures on Taiwan Semiconductor's capacity, creating a strategic opening for Intel to strengthen its position in the semiconductor industry.

data.title: OP Labs launches OP Enterprise, providing production-grade blockchain infrastructure for developers.Key info: OP Labs PBC, offering scalable and secure networks and apps.
data.description: OP Labs PBC (oplabs.co), a blockchain infrastructure provider, has revealed its latest development - OP Enterprise - a production-grade blockchain solution for developers and enterprises. The platform aims to facilitate the launch of scalable, secure, and customizable networks and applications. The announcement was made on January 29, 2026, in New York.

data.title: University of Phoenix College of Doctoral Studies releases white paper on emotional intelligence's impact on organizational wellness. Leadership may strengthen psychological safety and performance.ännounced the publication of a white paper on Emotional Intelligence (EI), authored by research Fellow Chanell Russell. The paper explores how emotionally intelligent leadership can enhance psychological safety, engagement, and sustainable performance within organizations.
data.description: A recent study conducted by Chanell Russell, a research Fellow, delves into the impact of emotionally intelligent leadership on enhancing psychological safety, engagement, and sustainable performance. This analysis, released on January 29, 2026, emphasizes the importance of emotional intelligence in fostering a conducive work environment. The research was conducted at the University of Phoenix College of Doctoral Studies. The findings underline the significant role emotional intelligence plays in driving productivity and well-being in the workplace.

data.title: Attentive® enhances Two-Tap™, introduces new solutions for brand protection and compliance amid evolving mobile landscape.
data.description: Attentive, a company based in New York, has announced the expansion of its two-tap™ feature to desktop along with the introduction of new tools. These tools are designed to aid brands in safeguarding their reach, increasing their subscriber base, and ensuring compliance as the mobile landscape continues to evolve. This move aims to enhance user experience and maximize engagement across various platforms.
